title: Color Pickers
description: Plugin for coloring nicknames in different colors and even in gradients
body:
# 🎨 Color Picker

**Color Picker** is a plugin for stylish nickname customization.  
Change colors, create smooth gradients, and stand out from other players with ease.

---

## ✨ Features
- **Change nickname color**
- **Gradient support**
- **User-friendly GUI menu**
- **Placeholder support:** `%colorpicker_nickname%`
- **Velocity support**
- **Reload without server restart**

---

## ⌨ Commands
- **/nickcolor** | **/nc** — open the nickname settings menu  
- **/colorpicker reload** — reload the configuration

---

## 💡 Use Cases
Color Picker is perfect for servers where player appearance matters.  
Great for **RP servers**, **mini-games**, and any project that wants more style and personality.

Lightweight, easy to use, and quick to set up.
